channel.title: Zeitschrift für Physikalische Chemie
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Physikalische Chemie

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Preparation of fluorinated zirconia doped with tin oxide nanocomposites for photocatalytic degradation of organic dyes in contaminated water bodies
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0501

item.title: A study of the effect of cerium ion doping concentration on the structural, electrical, and thermoelectric properties of CaMnO3 nanoparticles
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0400

item.title: Biosensors and its diverse applications in healthcare systems

item.title: Estimation on magnetic entropy change and specific heat capacity through phoenomological model for Heusler melt spun ribbon of Ni47Mn40−xSi x In3 (x = 1, 2 and 3)
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0518

item.title: Probing the structural and electronic properties of MAX phases and their corresponding MXenes using first-principles calculations
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0018

item.title: Boosted electrochemical properties of Co3O4 nanoflakes by the addition of a redox-additive electrolyte
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0017

item.title: Evaluation of magnetic and electrochemical performance of copper oxide nanoparticles using Myristica fragrans (mace) extract
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0582

item.title: Incredible electrochemical performance of ZnWO4/PANI as a favorable electrode material for supercapacitor
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2023-0523

item.title: Influence of doping concentrations on the structural, optical, and magnetic properties of Ba-doped LaCoO3 nanostructure
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0600

item.title: Green engineering of NiO nanoparticles decorated with Arachis hypogaea shell extract for biomedical applications
item.description: Article by Sharmila Saminathan, Gowri Sundaram, Aarthi Jayapal, Faiyaz Shakeel, Sivaranjani Rajalingam, Shandhiya Murugan, Kalaiarasi Kalaichelvan, Md. Faiyazuddin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zpch-2024-0856
